历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 209 → 184 → 174 → 166 → 178. Over the past five years, there has been a slight upward trend (from 209 to 178). In 2025, it slightly shifted back by 12 places compared to 2024, but overall fluctuation is small. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 178. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Physics Category was 25 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 23 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 24, a slight increase of 1 person (+4.3%) compared to 2025, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 3rd in the Shanghai Ranking for many years (2021–2026 all 3rd), placing it among the top national universities, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, but its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms. Historical enrollment anomaly records show low or medium attention from 2021 to 2023, with no obvious signal of enrollment gaps, so overall application heat remains high. Zhejiang University has numerous A+ disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Plant Protection, Ecology, Pharmacy, Management Science and Engineering, etc. It has over 30 A-level disciplines, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, Electronic Information, etc.), with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with very high social attention. The total number of Heilongjiang Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 167,000 (slightly down from 172,114 in 2025), so competition pressure for Physics Category candidates has eased somewhat. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (2025), which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight upward trend in historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (23→24), the slight decrease in the total number of Heilongjiang Province candidates, and the sustained high popularity of majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be roughly flat based on the 2025 baseline of 178. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 183, with a range of 133–233.

- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Type) (Electrical Engineering and Automation (Edison Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Edison Class), Electronic Science and Technology (Shannon Class), Information Engineering (Shannon Class)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Information Engineering, Automation, Biomedical Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Including Business Big Data Analysis Dual Degree Program) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Physics, Psychology, Information Management and Information Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 133–233, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Information) and Artificial Intelligence as main targets, use Tier 1 Robotics Engineering and EE Type as reach options, and Tier 3 Science Experimental Class as safety. Zhejiang University has top disciplinary strength, and the ranking differences between majors are small, so it is advisable to choose based on personal interest and discipline evaluation levels.
